title: Law firm matter management + time tracking
pain_description: Billable hours logged after the fact; matter-specific notes in email; WIP invisible; leakage 10-20% of billables.
santifer_pattern: Activity stream + LLM time-entry drafter + matter tagger

title: Law firm: conflicts check on new matter
pain_description: New matter requires conflicts check across historical clients + adverse parties; mistakes = malpractice.
santifer_pattern: Matter + client DB + LLM relationship checker

title: Litigation discovery document review
pain_description: Millions of docs per case; TAR (technology-assisted review) helps but review still takes weeks.
santifer_pattern: Doc corpus + LLM classifier + privilege reviewer + production log

title: Law firm billing narrative for client-bill review
pain_description: Client requires UTBMS codes + narratives; e-billing rejections common; partner writes narratives at end of month.
santifer_pattern: Time entries + matter context + LLM narrative generator

title: Law firm knowledge management + precedent search
pain_description: Looking for prior-matter briefs + template; firm KM weak; associates redraft instead of reusing.
santifer_pattern: Firm corpus RAG + LLM precedent finder + doc assembler

title: Law firm timekeeper capacity + workload balancing
pain_description: Associates overloaded vs underutilized; assignments ad-hoc; burnout + leverage loss.
santifer_pattern: Time + skill + LLM assignment recommender

title: Corporate secretary: entity management across jurisdictions
pain_description: Subsidiaries across 20+ jurisdictions; annual reports + franchise tax + registered agents all different deadlines.
santifer_pattern: Entity registry + jurisdiction rules + filing agent + deadline alerts

title: Accounting firm: engagement letter + client onboarding
pain_description: Each new client: engagement letter + scope + pricing + doc collection + engagement start. 2-3 weeks.
santifer_pattern: Intake + LLM engagement letter + client portal onboarding

title: Tax preparation: missing-doc chase at small-firm CPA
pain_description: Jan-April: clients dribble docs; staff chases manually; deadlines push late-filed.
santifer_pattern: Checklist + client texting agent + reminder

title: Consulting firm: client deliverable + slide reuse
pain_description: Each engagement deck cobbled from prior work; associates redraft slides; knowledge lost.
santifer_pattern: Slide corpus + LLM retriever + deck assembler

title: Architecture firm: specification writing + coordination
pain_description: Project specs (CSI MasterFormat) + drawings coordination + RFI responses. hours consumed per project.
santifer_pattern: Project data + LLM spec writer + RFI responder

title: Engineering firm: proposal + teaming for government contracts
pain_description: SF 254/255 + past performance + teaming agreements per pursuit; 80-120 hrs per proposal.
santifer_pattern: Past work RAG + LLM proposal drafter + teaming matcher

title: Insurance adjuster: CAT claims report writing
pain_description: Photograph damage + write report + estimate repair. 2-4 hrs per claim; CAT events = backlog.
santifer_pattern: Photo + voice + LLM report + Xactimate sketch

title: Appraisal firm: comparable-property analysis
pain_description: Each report: pull comps + adjust + write. hours per report; MLS + CoStar data scraping manual.
santifer_pattern: MLS + comp selector + LLM narrative + grid filler

title: Staffing agency: candidate-client matching
pain_description: 100s of open roles + 1000s of candidates; matching manual; placements slow.
santifer_pattern: Candidate + role vectors + LLM match + outreach

title: PR agency: media monitoring + pitch personalization
pain_description: Monitor mentions + personalize pitches to journalists; Cision expensive; still manual.
santifer_pattern: Mention feed + journalist DB + LLM personalizer

title: Marketing agency: client reporting + dashboarding
pain_description: Monthly client reports pull from Google Ads + Meta + analytics + SEO tools; hours to assemble.
santifer_pattern: Multi-platform + LLM narrative + client portal

title: Web design agency: client-site change requests + QA
pain_description: Client DM'd change requests; devs code; QA misses; back-and-forth days.
santifer_pattern: Request intake + scope parser + dev ticket + QA agent

title: Video production agency: project coordination
pain_description: Storyboard + shoot + edit + review + final. clients miss review rounds; revisions pile up.
santifer_pattern: Project SSOT + client comms + LLM scope enforcer

title: Architecture permit submission / plan review
pain_description: City plan review takes weeks; markup + resubmit; multiple jurisdictions diff.
santifer_pattern: Plan + code RAG + LLM pre-submission checker

title: Civil engineering: stormwater + drainage calculations
pain_description: Stormwater calc + drainage report per project per jurisdiction; rules vary; manual.
santifer_pattern: Site data + local code + LLM calc + report

title: Structural engineer: peer review + markup
pain_description: Peer review markups + code compliance check per project; sealed drawings liability.
santifer_pattern: Drawing + code RAG + LLM markup

title: Executive coaching firm: client session notes + action items
pain_description: Each client session: 1 hr coaching + 30 min notes + action-item tracking; scales poorly.
santifer_pattern: Session transcript + LLM note + action tracker

title: Executive search firm: candidate reference check
pain_description: Reference calls + background + due diligence = 5-10 hrs per finalist; repetitive.
santifer_pattern: Candidate + reference list + voice agent + LLM synthesizer

title: Independent RIA: manual client KYC refresh
pain_description: Annual/biennial KYC refresh with clients; paper forms + wet signatures; compliance deadline looms.
santifer_pattern: Refresh intake + e-sign + compliance log

title: Translation agency: terminology + style-guide compliance
pain_description: Each client has style guide + term base; translators drift; QA post-hoc.
santifer_pattern: Style + term base + LLM QA agent

title: Patent prosecution: office action response
pain_description: USPTO office action response per patent; prior-art argument + claim amendments; hours per OA.
santifer_pattern: OA + prior art + LLM drafter + claim amender

title: Trademark clearance + watch
pain_description: Clearance search + office action + annual watch; manual.
santifer_pattern: Mark + class + LLM risk memo + watch agent

title: Labor & employment: EEOC charge response
pain_description: EEOC charges + position statements + document production; tight deadlines.
santifer_pattern: Charge + HR records + LLM position-statement drafter

title: Real estate closing: title commitment review
pain_description: Title commitment 10-50 pages of exceptions; each needs resolution before closing.
santifer_pattern: Commitment + LLM exception resolver

title: Engineering firm: CAD standards + template compliance
pain_description: Firm standards drift across projects; layer names, title blocks inconsistent; costly rework.
santifer_pattern: Project + standards RAG + LLM checker

title: Construction subcontractor: pay application + lien release
pain_description: Monthly pay apps + lien waiver from suppliers + GC approval; cash flow tied to perfection.
santifer_pattern: Pay app template + vendor collector + GC submitter

title: Insurance defense law: medical bill analysis
pain_description: Plaintiff claims $50K medical bills; defense must analyze each charge for reasonableness.
santifer_pattern: Bill + CPT benchmark + LLM analysis + demand response

title: Franchise sales + compliance
pain_description: FDD updates annually + registration per state + franchisee compliance audits.
santifer_pattern: FDD + state rules + LLM audit + outreach

title: CPA tax: multi-state allocation + apportionment
pain_description: Multi-state corps need apportionment per state; rule changes mid-year; spreadsheets fragile.
santifer_pattern: Financial data + state rules + LLM allocator

title: Independent bookkeeper: client chart of accounts cleanup
pain_description: New clients hand over messy QBO; categorization wrong; cleanup 40+ hrs before ongoing work.
santifer_pattern: QBO + LLM re-categorizer + client approval flow

title: AE firm: project billing milestone + WIP
pain_description: AIA/deliverable-based billing; WIP + overruns tracked in Excel; margins erode silently.
santifer_pattern: Project + hours + milestone + LLM WIP narrative

title: Immigration law: H-1B lottery + RFE response
pain_description: H-1B season: 1000s of petitions; RFEs spike; tight deadlines.
santifer_pattern: Client data + RFE classifier + LLM response + deadline tracker

title: Bankruptcy law: means test + schedule prep
pain_description: Ch 7/13 schedules + means test + SOFA + creditor matrix. dozens of forms per case.
santifer_pattern: Client intake + LLM form filler + court e-file

title: Family law: financial affidavit + discovery
pain_description: Divorce cases: financial affidavits + discovery + child support calcs per state formula.
santifer_pattern: Client financials + state formula + LLM affidavit

title: Notary signing agent for mortgage closings
pain_description: Loan packages 100+ pages; page-by-page signing; errors delay funding; mobile notaries get paid per signing.
santifer_pattern: Loan pack + signature map + mobile notary workflow

title: Title insurance underwriting risk review
pain_description: Each policy: survey + docs + chain-of-title review; judgment calls on exceptions.
santifer_pattern: Title doc + LLM risk analyzer + exception generator

title: Consulting firm: billing write-offs + realization
pain_description: Partner discretionary write-offs + client realization rate; measurement after the fact; margin erosion hidden.
santifer_pattern: Billing + time + LLM write-off analyzer

title: Audit firm: audit work paper documentation
pain_description: Work papers redone annually; tests of controls + substantive procedures; juniors burn.
santifer_pattern: Prior year + current + LLM work-paper draft + review

title: Construction administrator: RFIs + submittals + ASIs
pain_description: Hundreds of RFIs + submittals per project; routing to consultants; logs across Procore + email.
santifer_pattern: RFI intake + LLM router + consultant agent + log

title: Boutique investment bank: pitch book production
pain_description: Pitch books: company profile + comps + precedents + fairness. nights per book; associate attrition.
santifer_pattern: Company + comp data + LLM slide generator

title: Law firm: outside counsel guidelines + billing guidelines
pain_description: Outside counsel must follow corp's OCG; bills rejected for non-compliance; friction both sides.
santifer_pattern: OCG + bill parser + LLM compliance check

title: Risk consulting: CFO + controls assessment
pain_description: Enterprise risk assessment: 100+ controls tested; reports + remediation over months.
santifer_pattern: Control library + LLM test generator + report

title: Surveyor: boundary + topo survey report
pain_description: Field data → CAD drawing → legal description + report; multiple cycles of correction.
santifer_pattern: Field data + CAD + LLM legal description generator

title: Environmental consulting: Phase I ESA
pain_description: Phase I ESA: historical use + regulatory DB search + site visit + ASTM report; weeks per site.
santifer_pattern: Address + historic DB + LLM ASTM-compliant report
